assertions.title: Root operator entrypoints advertise cogent only

steps.action: Search for cagent/cagent references in README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md
steps.observed: Exit code 1 (no matches) - confirmed no legacy references

steps.action: Search for cogent references in README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md
steps.expected: Multiple matches showing cogent commands and .cogent paths
steps.observed: Exit code 0 with 29 matches across all three files showing cogent work commands, cogent serve, .cogent paths

evidence.summary: Root docs exclusively reference cogent for work management, no cagent references remain

assertions.title: Active dispatch docs describe the cogent work-graph contract

steps.expected: Document describes cogent work graph and commands
steps.observed: ADR-0026 explicitly mentions 'current cogent work graph', 'cogent work list/ready', and describes cogent as work management system

steps.action: Search for cagent references in dispatch docs
steps.observed: Exit code 1 - no cagent references found in ADR-0026 or local-provider-matrix-validation.md

steps.expected: Uses cogent terminology for ready-work, claim, update, note, attestation
steps.observed: ADR-0026 uses cogent work graph terminology consistently, mentions dependency graph walker and work items

evidence.summary: Active dispatch documentation uses cogent work-graph terminology exclusively

assertions.title: Root and operator runbooks stop advertising removed adapters

steps.action: Search for deprecated adapter references (codex, opencode, --codex-openai-bridge) in root docs
steps.expected: No matches for codex, opencode, or --codex-openai-bridge
steps.observed: Exit code 1 (no matches) in README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md

steps.action: Search for deprecated adapter references in operator runbooks
steps.expected: No matches in local-provider-matrix-validation.md and ADR-0026
steps.observed: Exit code 1 (no matches) - no deprecated adapter references found

evidence.summary: Root entrypoints and operator runbooks are free of deprecated adapter references

assertions.title: Live docs and live scripts agree on supported command flags

steps.observed: Documentation shows all expected flags with usage examples

steps.expected: Script supports the same flags documented
steps.observed: Script help shows: --models, --skip-model-tests, --gateway-base, --gateway-token, plus --skip-gateway-search and --help (additional but non-conflicting)

steps.action: Verify pre-commit hook uses cogent commands as documented
steps.expected: Hook uses cogent work commands matching root doc examples
steps.observed: Hook uses 'cogent work list --json', 'cogent work doc-set' matching CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md examples

steps.action: Check for githooks documentation in root docs
steps.expected: No explicit githooks documentation or it matches hook behavior
steps.observed: Exit code 1 - no explicit githooks documentation in root docs, avoiding mismatch risk

evidence.comparison: Documented flags in local-provider-matrix-validation.md match script --help output. Pre-commit hook cogent commands match root doc examples.
evidence.summary: Live docs and scripts are consistent - no flag mismatches or deprecated command references

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. Root operator docs exclusively reference cogent with no legacy cagent/adapter references. Active dispatch docs describe the cogent work-graph contract. Operator scripts and docs agree on supported command flags. The docs-finalize cutover is complete and consistent across all documentation surfaces.
